blended.narrative: Kicking Horse is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,601 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total. Strong winds with gusts to 58 mph may cause lift holds.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: flurries, highs of 24°F, gusts to 58 mph.
Monday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
